title: biscutella austriaca subsp. hungarica
intro: Biscutella austriaca subsp. hungarica, also known as Hungarian biscutella, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the family Brassicaceae. It is a perennial herb with medicinal properties, traditionally used to treat various health issues. The plant has been found to have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which may contribute to its health benefits, such as reducing inflammation and improving cardiovascular health. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, although more research is needed to fully understand its potential uses and effects.
